title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Term Insurance Without Medical Tests in India
Life is unpredictable, and there may be no way of knowing what the future holds. Therefore, it may be essential to ensure that your loved ones may be financially protected in case something happens to you. Term insurance plans may provide a financial safety net for your family in case of any unforeseen circumstances.
With term insurance, you pay a premium to the life insurance company and in return, the life insurance company provides you with a life cover throughout the tenure of the policy. However, many insurance buyers have a common doubt while purchasing term plans: Is it possible to get term insurance without undergoing medical check-ups in India? Read further to find your answers.
Is It Possible to Buy a Term Insurance Without a Medical Test?
Yes, it may be possible to purchase a term insurance plan without a medical test in India. Life insurance companies in the country may offer term insurance policies that do not require medical check-ups. For example, some workplaces might offer insurance to their employees, as part of a group insurance policy. When availing group term insurance plans, employees may not be required to go through medical tests.[1] They may qualify for the  term plan by simply meeting the required basic criteria.
If you’re purchasing life insurance on your own, whether you need to undergo a medical screening depends on your age and the amount of coverage you are seeking. If you have any pre-existing or chronic ailments, you may be required to undergo a medical examination.
It is recommended that you conduct thorough research before purchasing a term insurance plan. Read the terms and conditions of your term plan and be aware of its inclusions and exclusions before buying one. This may especially be more important since you are purchasing term life insurance without a medical test.
Things to consider while buying term insurance without medical test
When you are buying a term plan without any medical tests, you may want to keep the pointers below in mind-
Be transparent about your health
A pre-existing illness or a critical health condition may affect the quality and span of your life. If you have avoided stating your health condition, it may affect the acceptance of future claims. It may be best if you’re completely transparent about your health to avoid hassles with any policy-related dealings in the future.
Avoid conceding information regarding your lifestyle
Lifestyle habits like smoking or drinking frequently may have a direct impact on your health and your life span potentially. Intentionally hiding information about your lifestyle habits may lead to an incorrect estimate of the premium amount for your policy. If an insurer discovers the same, it may lead to a cancellation of your policy. Hence, you may want to disclose your lifestyle habit as required by the proposal form while buying a term plan without a medical test.
Read the fine print
When it comes to buying a term insurance without medical tests, you may want to ensure to read the fine print of your term plan policy. Being well-aware of the inclusions and exclusions of the plan may help you avoid any problems at the time of claim. Also, if you find it difficult to find a suitable plan without medical tests, you may buy a term plan with medical examination.
It is important to understand that obtaining a suitable term insurance policy may be a crucial aspect of financial planning. You may conveniently purchase term life insurance policies with no medical tests at reasonable rates to ensure that your family may be safeguarded even in your absence. However, usually without medical tests, you may have to pay a higher premium or compromise on the coverage amount.
Ensure that you do not hide anything from your life insurance provider intentionally regarding your health. The repercussion of such an act may be a rejection of the term insurance claim altogether which may put your family in a financially uncomfortable place.
References-

word_comments.comment: The article speaks less about this and more about why medical tests are important, with highly repetitive content. Either rewrite the whole article, or discard it.
word_comments.paragraph_context: Term Insurance Without Medical Tests in India

word_comments.author: Shruti Gujarathi/Pune HO/Marketing/Life
word_comments.comment: Why haven’t we mentioned anything about Group insurance plans? Don’t they offer insurance without medical test?
word_comments.paragraph_context: Term Insurance Without Medical Tests in India

word_comments.comment: Added a paragraph here on group term insurance.
word_comments.paragraph_context: Yes, it may be possible to purchase a term insurance plan without a medical test...
